precondition: Load any project in T1 or T2 mode
expected_result: 'No filters yet. Add rows below.' message is shown. No filter rows are listed.

action: Select a categorical/text column (e.g. country). Choose op 'in'. Type or select a value. Click '+ Add'
expected_result: The pending row appears in the list above the form: '{column} any of {value} [String]'. Form fields reset to defaults.

precondition: Project loaded; numeric column available in active plot
action: Select a numeric column. Choose op 'eq'. Type a number. Click '+ Add'
expected_result: Pending row shows '{column} = {value} [Float64]' (or Int). Value field is a numeric input (not free text).

action: Select a numeric column. Choose op 'between'. Two numeric inputs appear (min / max). Fill both. Leave inclusivity toggle at default (≤ ≤). Click '+ Add'

precondition: Project loaded; numeric column available; a between row already added
action: Change the inclusivity toggle to '< < exclusive' before clicking Add. Click '+ Add'.

precondition: At least one pending filter row in the list
action: Click the ✕ (or 🗑 when changed) button next to a row
expected_result: The row disappears from the pending list. Other rows are unaffected.

scenario: Apply filter in T2 mode updates plot
precondition: Project loaded; T2 mode active; add a filter that excludes some rows (e.g. country eq France, known to be in data)
expected_result: Plot data updates — filtered rows removed. Data preview below also reflects the filter. Notification: '✅ N filter(s) applied.'

precondition: At least one applied filter active
expected_result: Applied filters cleared. Plot and data preview return to full dataset. Notification confirms reset. Pending list shows 'No filters yet.'

scenario: String column uses selectize / text input
precondition: Project loaded; a string/categorical column available
action: Select a string column in the filter form
expected_result: Op choices include 'in' / 'not_in' / 'eq' / 'ne'. Value field is a selectize dropdown (showing known values from data, or free-text input).

precondition: Project loaded; a numeric column available (e.g. identity / year)
action: Select a numeric column in the filter form
expected_result: Op choices include 'eq' / 'ne' / 'gt' / 'ge' / 'lt' / 'le' / 'between'. Value field is a numeric input (ui.input_numeric), NOT a text box.

scenario: Numeric filter actually filters (no dtype error)
precondition: Numeric column available (e.g. identity ≥ 95.0); add filter '{col} gt 90'
expected_result: Plot and data preview update — rows with value ≤ 90 are removed. NO render error 'cannot compare string with numeric'. [NOTE: this was a known bug (DEMO-3) — was fixed in commit 4c962e6. Should now pass.]

precondition: A year column present in data (e.g. MLST bar chart with year). Add filter 'year gt 2022'.
expected_result: Plot filters to years > 2022. No error. [NOTE: was broken before DEMO-4 fix — confirm still works.]

scenario: Op dropdown preserved after column change
precondition: Open filter form; select a column; choose op 'ne'
action: Change the column selection to a different column of the same dtype
expected_result: Op stays at 'ne' (is not reset to default). [NOTE: this was fixed in commit 5c5083f — confirm still works.]

scenario: Apply in T3 sends to audit (not direct apply)
precondition: Project loaded; T3 mode active (tier toggle on T3); add a filter row
expected_result: Propagation modal opens — does NOT silently apply. Modal shows scope options (This plot only / All plots / All plots except…).

scenario: Filter rows icon in audit panel
precondition: T3 mode; added a non-PK filter; sent to audit via modal ('This plot only')
expected_result: Right sidebar shows pending node with icon 🔍 (Row Filter). Node is NOT 🚫 (Exclusion).

scenario: PK column filter shows warning in modal
precondition: T3 mode; add a filter where column = primary key (e.g. sample_id eq S2); click '➜ Audit'
expected_result: Modal shows yellow ⚠️ banner: 'One or more nodes target a join key…'. Scope options still available.

scenario: PK filter allowed — node type is filter_row NOT exclusion
precondition: T3 mode; PK filter added and sent to audit
expected_result: Pending node in right sidebar shows 🔍 Row Filter icon (NOT 🚫 Exclusion). PK warning banner visible on node. [Per ADR-049a: PK filtering ALLOWED, silent conversion removed.]

scenario: Filter form columns scoped to active plot
precondition: Multiple plots in different sub-tabs loaded
action: Switch between plot sub-tabs and observe the column choices in the filter form
expected_result: Column list changes per plot sub-tab — only columns present in that plot's data are shown. A column from plot A does not appear in plot B's filter form.
